'''pashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outback|outback]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outback|outback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pashate|pashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pashatesher|pashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pashatesherĂ«m|pashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pashatero|pashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pashateshĂ«|pashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pashateshĂ«m|pashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipashatero|gokipashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipashateshĂ«|gokipashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipashateshĂ«m|gokipashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopashankerom|gopashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopashankeshĂ«|gopashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopashankeshĂ«m|gopashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopashankeya|gopashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pashaterom|pashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pashatemu|pashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pashateya|pashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipashaterom|gokipashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipashatemu|gokipashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipashateya|gokipashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pashashate|pashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pashashatesher|pashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pashashatesherĂ«m|pashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pashashatero|pashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pashashateshĂ«|pashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pashashateshĂ«m|pashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipashashatero|gokipashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipashashateshĂ«|gokipashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipashashateshĂ«m|gokipashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopashashankerom|gopashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopashashankeshĂ«|gopashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopashashankeshĂ«m|gopashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopashashankeya|gopashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pashashaterom|pashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pashashatemu|pashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pashashateya|pashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipashashaterom|gokipashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipashashatemu|gokipashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipashashateya|gokipashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠte|pĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠtesher|pĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠtero|pĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠshĂŠtero|gokipĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠterom|pĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠtemu|pĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠshĂŠteya|pĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠshĂŠterom|gokipĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠshĂŠteya|gokipĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafshafte|pafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafshaftesher|pafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafshaftesherĂ«m|pafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafshaftero|pafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafshafteshĂ«|pafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafshafteshĂ«m|pafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafshaftero|gokipafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafshafteshĂ«|gokipafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafshafteshĂ«m|gokipafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafshafnkerom|gopafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafshafnkeshĂ«|gopafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafshafnkeshĂ«m|gopafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafshafnkeya|gopafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafshafterom|pafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafshaftemu|pafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafshafteya|pafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafshafterom|gokipafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafshaftemu|gokipafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafshafteya|gokipafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
